\tzpentry{ID3810}{Action Expansion}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3810 introduces Action Expansion as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$ĤSC = \sum (\epsilon_k - \mu)(c^\dagger_{k\uparrow} c_{k\uparrow} + c^\dagger_{k\downarrow} c_{k\downarrow}) + \Delta \sum (c^\dagger_{k\uparrow} c^\dagger_{-k\downarrow} + h.c.)$
\]
